title: Coelogyne kouytcheensis
taxonomy: Coelogyne kouytcheensis is classified under the kingdom Plantae, and more specifically under the phylum Angiosperms. It belongs to the class Liliopsida and the order Asparagales. Within the order Asparagales, Coelogyne kouytcheensis is further classified under the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. The genus Coelogyne is a subgenus within the orchid family, and Coelogyne kouytcheensis is one of its species. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other plant species.
